keyEvents.text: First Half begins.
Delay in match (Austria).
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Marko Arnautovic (Austria) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Delay in match because of an injury Aïssa Mandi (Algeria).
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Delay in match for a drinks break.
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Goal! Algeria 0, Austria 1. Marko Arnautovic (Austria) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by David Alaba with a through ball.
Goal! Algeria 1, Austria 1. Rafik Belghali (Algeria) left footed shot from the centre of the box to the top right corner.
Substitution, Austria. Michael Gregoritsch replaces Marko Arnautovic.
Substitution, Austria. Florian Grillitsch replaces Xaver Schlager.
Substitution, Austria. Paul Wanner replaces Romano Schmid.
Second Half begins Algeria 1, Austria 1.
Goal! Algeria 1, Austria 2. Marcel Sabitzer (Austria) right footed shot from outside the box to the top right corner. Assisted by Konrad Laimer.
Goal! Algeria 2, Austria 2. Riyad Mahrez (Algeria) left footed shot from the centre of the box to the top right corner. Assisted by Houssem Aouar.
Substitution, Austria. Kevin Danso replaces David Alaba.
Delay in match for a drinks break.
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Substitution, Algeria. Rayan Aït-Nouri replaces Jaouen Hadjam.
Substitution, Algeria. Zineddine Belaïd replaces Amine Gouiri.
Substitution, Algeria. Samir Chergui replaces Rafik Belghali.
Goal! Algeria 3, Austria 2. Riyad Mahrez (Algeria) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Houssem Aouar with a through ball.
Substitution, Algeria. Farès Ghedjemis replaces Houssem Aouar.
Substitution, Austria. Sasa Kalajdzic replaces Phillipp Mwene.
Goal! Algeria 3, Austria 3. Sasa Kalajdzic (Austria) header from the centre of the box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Michael Gregoritsch with a headed pass.
